title: phlomoides dentosa var. glabrescens
intro: Phlomoides dentosa var. glabrescens, also known as a variety of the Phlomoides dentosa plant, is a flowering plant species within the family Lamiaceae. This plant is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phlomoides dentosa var. glabrescens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support overall well-being and promote natural healing processes.
